title: Use of os2MutexNotheld before their definition
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, value REAL DEFAULT 0.0, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('Test2', NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND created_at > '2023-01-01 00:00:00';
UPDATE test_table SET value = value + 1 WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name = 'Test1');
